title: Crisp Middle Eastern Chicken Musakhan
description: A twist on the traditional Middle Eastern dish, incorporating Chinese flavors. Crispy chicken thighs served with musakhan and steamed vegetables.
instructions: 2. Season the chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
3. Heat 2 tbsp of sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Sear the chicken thighs until browned, then transfer to a baking sheet.
5. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
6. While the chicken is baking, heat 1 tbsp of soy sauce in the skillet over medium heat.
7. Add the chopped green onions and minced garlic to the skillet, and stir-fry until fragrant.
8. Add 1 cup of musakhan to the skillet, and stir-fry until heated through.
9. Once the chicken is done, let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
10. Serve the sliced chicken with the musakhan mixture spooned on top.
11. Garnish with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
